description: Using more of our data, particularly our text data. Getting better insight and reducing the need for more data scientists as they don't have to manually transform the data anymore.

description: We were able to build complex machine learning models, with thousands of classes, very quickly and accurately without needing a data scientist.
author: Dan S.
pros: Easy for a non data scientist to use and build predictive models. Useful in many use cases including automation and getting actionable insight from text that you can't get from normal text analytics. It is also easy to plug into via the API.
cons: The GUI is straightforward but fairly simplistic. It is intuitive once you start using it and the support is good, but some things could be easier to do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
